summary: Comprehensive frontend testing completed successfully. All critical z-index fixes verified working. Sidebar toggle now clickable without force=True, header contains logo, sidebar positioned below header, and all navigation pages work correctly. Dark/light mode toggle, profile dropdown, and logout functionality all operational.
passed_tests: Login page loads with professional design and correct branding
Login authentication successful with admin@tax.gov/admin123 credentials
Header displays with RP logo icon and 'Tax Admin System' text
CRITICAL: Sidebar toggle button clickable WITHOUT force=True (z-index issue resolved)
Sidebar correctly positioned below header at top-16 (no overlap)
Profile dropdown opens and displays all menu items
Profile dropdown contains Profile, Settings, and Logout options
Dashboard displays all 4 KPI cards (Total Properties, Collected Tax, Pending Payments, Delinquent Accounts)
Global search input field functional and accepts text
Recent Activity section displays on dashboard
Logout functionality redirects to login page successfully
